next_item.text: A integridade do snapshot ativo é 100%.

dod_controller.note: Checkbox visual ≠ ACCEPTED. DOD state not mutated during baseline.

limitations: Presence is descriptive and is never coverage.
Complementary sources do not replace required source combinations.
entity_coverage.is_covered / any_row are forbidden as coverage methods.
Applicability without proven rule is unknown (never silent applicable).
Gate PASS requires coverage>=95%, zero applicability unknown/blocked, zero unmapped evidence.
Draft/missing source policy never forms a valid denominator.

implemented_but_not_operationally_proven: scripts/ops/weekly_cycle.py (per-modalidade PncpOpportunityCrawler without parent aggregate in weekly path)
scripts/opportunity_intel/reconciliation.py SourceSnapshotReconciler (proven in unit/integration tests; wired in pncp_audit but not weekly_cycle)
scripts/ops/deliverable_e_editais.py (fixture-only operational path; empty audit vacuous pass)
deploy/systemd extra-crawl-pncp / pncp-crawl-full / pncp-crawl-inc (concurrent PNCP paths; no extra-weekly timer)
documented_only: weekly cycle as canonical make extra-weekly
blockers_to_operational_use: open_tenders coverage 0% / 946 never_checked in last dual report
weekly_cycle default PNCP SLA 48h conflicts with DOD 24h
ciga_ckan sla_hours 48 conflicts with DOD 24h for editais
deliverable E fixture can pass audit without live data
no VPS timer for extra-weekly observed in repo units
VPS opportunity_intel empty (prior handoff; re-verify at verify-production)

chosen_canonical_path.rationale: Reuse existing aggregated monitoring + reconciler; do not invent a parallel pipeline.

largest_gap_confirmed: open_tenders operational cycle at coverage zero; historical contracts advanced
